categories.name: FIP - Translation Part 1
categories.description: Incremental translation scaffold for all FIP mods. English source text is copied 1:1 and propagated as fallback into every configured locale when entries are added or changed.

categories.name: FIP - Translation Part 2
categories.description: Incremental translation scaffold for all FCP mods. English source text is copied 1:1 and propagated as fallback into every configured locale when entries are added or changed.

categories.name: FIP - Translation Part 3
categories.description: Incremental translation scaffold for mods referenced by FIP dependencies, loadAfter entries, and MayRequire patches, excluding FIP, FCP, and official DLC package IDs.

categories.name: FIP - Translation Part 4
categories.description: Incremental translation scaffold for playset mods that are neither FIP, FCP, nor compatibility-target mods.
